title: Scur
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''scur''' was a communal creature found on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] eaten by [[nightdweller]]s.<ref name="AI">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

[[Tirranna]] considered the [[Venithon Twins]] escaped from her "like a scur from the jaws of a [[nightdweller]]."<ref name="AI" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
